theme_archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy / Trust) with Luxury Elements (Light Theme)
design_philosophy: A modern, premium legal/financial recovery site for 'Flowstar Asset Recovery'. The design uses high-contrast navy against powder blue to establish authority, with gold accents to signal wealth and successful recovery. The layout relies on generous spacing and asymmetrical bento grids to evoke a bespoke 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic, avoiding the generic SaaS look.

headings.weight_strategy: Use font-light for massive hero text, font-medium for standard headings.

layout.spacing_strategy: Generous. Use py-24 to py-32 for major sections. Containers should have ample p-8 to p-12 inner padding.
layout.grid_system: Bento grids with asymmetrical spans (e.g., col-span-8 and col-span-4). Avoid perfect symmetry. Leave breathing room.
layout.border_radius: Use rounded-xl for a soft modern feel, avoiding sharp harsh edges.
layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, labels, and forms. Center-align only major section headers or standalone CTAs.

ui_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/70, 1px border-b border-black/5. Sticky top with z-50.
ui_components.hero: Asymmetric split or bento style. Soft powder blue background block or very light overlay on architecture image with deep navy serif typography. High-contrast gold primary CTA.
ui_components.claim_checker_form: Multi-step Shadcn form. Neumorphic or soft-shadowed card embedded in the layout. Clear step indicators for: State, Property Type, Foreclosure Date, Contact Info.
ui_components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-[#0C2340] font-semibold hover:bg-[#B5952F] transition-all. Secondary: border border-[#0C2340] text-[#0C2340] hover:bg-[#0C2340] hover:text-white.
ui_components.cards: Flat background with a 1px subtle border, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg on hover.
ui_components.testimonials_carousel: Use Shadcn Carousel component (Embla). Cards should feature generous padding, quote icons, and clear typography.
ui_components.blog_section: Editorial ribbon or grid layout. Large typography for titles, muted colors for publish dates and categories.

hero_image.description: White modern cement building under blue sky, matches powder blue aesthetic and signifies structural trust.

about_team_image.description: Professional team collaborating, representing the Flowstar Asset Recovery experts.

process_image.description: Close up of person signing documents, ideal for the 'How It Works / Our Process' section.

motion.entrance: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-in-up animations on lists, form steps, and bento items.
motion.hover: Apply transition-transform and shadow utilities on cards and buttons (e.g., transition-all duration-300 ease-out).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies for motion and icons, ensuring you use .js files for React components.
Import Cormorant Garamond and IBM Plex Sans via Google Fonts in the HTML entry point or index.css.
Build the claim checker as a multi-step interactive component using Shadcn form primitives and validation logic.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='claim-start-button', data-testid='faq-accordion').
Ensure contrast ratios meet accessibility standards, specifically ensuring white or navy text is readable against the gold and powder blue backgrounds.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings; stick strictly to the font strategy outlined.
Avoid standard symmetrical Bootstrap-style columns; apply the 'Tetris' bento grid logic for feature sections.
For the Footer, use massive space (py-24), dark background (navy), and gold accents for a premium finish with necessary legal disclaimers.
